svg.metadata:
{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant BC as Beacon Client participant UV as Ultravisor Server BC->>UV: POST /1.0/Authenticate
{ UserName: "gpu-worker-1" } Note right of UV: Create session UV-->>BC: 200 { LoggedIn: true }
Set-Cookie: SessionID BC->>UV: POST /Beacon/Register
Cookie: SessionID
{ Capabilities, MaxConcurrent, Tags } Note right of UV: Create/reclaim beacon record
Associate with session UV-->>BC: 200 { BeaconID: "bcn-..." } loop Every 5s BC->>UV: POST /Beacon/Work/Poll
Cookie: SessionID Note right of UV: Validate session UV-->>BC: 200 { WorkItem } or null end ","style":"notebook"}
